titleStmt.title: SII 39.227: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 227. (A.R. No. 227 of 1916.) SEṄGANMĀL, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. SEṄGANMĀLĪŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA MĀRAVARMAṈ TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIṈ VĪRAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-11TH YEAR. (1290 A.D. ?)

summary.p: This inscription states that the assembly of Vaiśya and Vāṇiya merchants (nagarattōm) of the ‘18 deśās’ constructed the Alaṅgāra maṭha for the merit of Daṇmadāvaḷa kūttar in the temple of Śeṅgaṇmalīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṇār at Taiyūr alias Rājakēśvarinallūr in Kumiḻi nāḍu, which was a sub-division of Āmūr kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa maṇḍalam and also states that it set apart certain tolls on their merchandise (pepper, arecanut, etc.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟapaṉmar tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ ci virapāṇṭi
yatevarku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu śapta
miyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭaco
ḻamaṇṭalattu Āmurkkoṭṭattuk kumuḻi nāṭṭu taiyūrāṉa
Irācakecari nallūril Uṭaiyār ceṅkaṇamālicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār
koyil taṉmatāvaḷak kūviḷakkuttaṟku Aḷaṅkāra maṭamuñ ceyvittu
taṉma tāvaṉ tiruvācalum maṟṟum Uḷḷa tiruppaṇikaḷum ceykai
kku patiṇeṇpūmi vaiciya vāṇiyar nakarattom taṉmatāvaḷaṉ
tiruvācalil Iruntu Uṭaiyār ceṅkaṇamālicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār taṉma
tāvaḷak kūttarku Iṅku teṟku vaṭakku kiḻakku meṟku namakku Eruttup po
tikkup potikkoru kācum 2 10 5 paṭṭatu Aḷappatukku pākku po
ti miḷaku potikku 5 paṇamum piṭivaitta ku Oru paṇamum Itukku Āṉa
ri 5 10 4 paṇamum Āṇṭoṉṟukkuk kuṭikku Araippaṇamum veṇkala
m tta veṇkalamuṭaittum koḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷākavum taṉme pokku veḷ
ḷai Arici kkum Arici tūṇiyum Aṟaikaṟi veñcaṉamum kuṭuttu naṭattak kaṭavarkaḷāka
vum Ippaṭikku timal Itaiyāciṉai tantāyukkut tāṉe koṉṟa pāvaṅ koḷ
makattu nakaram paṇikka nakara
Digital edition of SII 39.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
